title: Red Omnitrix Totem
description: A Red Omnitrix-inspired Totem of Undying texture with a bold, powerful, and futuristic look.
body:
![Red Omnitrix Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55eb2922847e6cf8fe915b0e139bc195cde7c8a9_0.webp)

The Red Omnitrix Totem texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a bold red Omnitrix-inspired design. Featuring sharp details and a glowing red core, this texture gives the totem a powerful and intense appearance while remaining clear and recognizable during gameplay.

The design fits smoothly into Minecraft’s vanilla style while adding a unique, high-energy visual theme. It is ideal for PvP, survival, and multiplayer servers where visibility and style both matter.

Features

Red Omnitrix–inspired Totem of Undying texture

Glowing red core with clean, futuristic details

Highly visible and easy to recognize in PvP

Vanilla-friendly but visually unique design

Performance-friendly and lightweight

Compatible with survival and multiplayer gameplay
